title: YYZ by Rush on Mario Paint Composer
description:
This has pretty much wiped me out. I bet no one saw this one coming? Most of you proabably know this song from Guitar Hero, if at all, but it's one of my father's favorite songs and I pretty much made this for him, but I also really like the song. The soundfont is the same as my "Fragrance of Dark Coffee" video. Thanks once again to SatoshiLyish for editing it for me earlier (and no hard feelings for anything). Like I said, I'm beat so I will let my video do the talking. Enjoy!

#63 - Top Rated (Today) - Music
Thanks :)
